overall.description: First-person perspective from a bus driver's seat in a bus simulator game, driving through rainy urban German streets. The bus navigates intersections, follows traffic, stops at a bus stop to pick up passengers, and waits at traffic lights. Heavy rain and overcast skies create a wet, reflective road surface throughout the clip.

events.description: bus turns right at green traffic light intersection
passes through intersection following traffic signals

agents.ego_description: driving bus through rainy urban intersection, executing right turn and proceeding along multi-lane street

entered.detail: metal tram tracks running parallel to the road on the left side
multi-story residential buildings with modern facades lining the street
overhead traffic signal showing green for through traffic
rain-soaked asphalt with visible reflections and puddles

segments.scene_description: The bus departs from an intersection in heavy rain, windshield wipers active. The vehicle turns right onto a multi-lane urban street with tram tracks visible on the left. Modern apartment buildings line the right side while the wet road surface creates reflective patterns under the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane road with dedicated tram tracks

events.description: bus approaches and begins following large delivery truck
slowing down as truck brakes for upcoming bus stop

agents.ego_description: following a large delivery truck at reduced speed, approaching a bus stop zone

notable_agents.action: large delivery truck driving ahead and slowing down for bus stop

entered.detail: dark colored box truck with brake lights illuminated
covered waiting area with glass panels and yellow signage
silver metal railing separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The bus continues down the wet multi-lane road, now following a large delivery truck that occupies the center lane. Tram tracks run parallel on the left while a bus stop shelter with yellow signage becomes visible on the right. The truck ahead slows down as it approaches the bus stop zone.

events.description: bus comes to complete stop at designated bus stop
bus doors open to allow passenger boarding
passengers begin boarding the bus from the shelter

agents.ego_description: stopped at bus stop with doors open, allowing passengers to board from the shelter

notable_agents.action: group of passengers waiting under shelter and boarding the bus
man wearing hat entering through front door

entered.detail: bright yellow rectangular sign with black text indicating bus routes
several people standing under the shelter holding umbrellas

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls up to the stop, positioning next to the shelter where passengers wait under cover from the rain. The doors open and people begin boarding, including a man in a hat. The truck that was ahead has pulled away, and the bus remains stationary at the stop with wipers continuing to clear the heavy rain from the windshield.

events.description: bus departs from stop, accelerating into traffic
approaching red traffic light at next intersection
coming to stop at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: departing bus stop and driving to next intersection, stopping at red traffic light

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving parallel on the left side

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal showing red light requiring stop
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on road
red and white striped barriers along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: After passengers board, the bus pulls away from the stop and continues down the rain-soaked street. A white car passes on the left as the bus approaches the next intersection. The vehicle slows and comes to a stop at a red traffic light, with zebra crossing markings visible on the wet asphalt ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a rain-soaked urban street from an initial intersection to a final traffic stop. It begins by turning right onto a multi-lane road lined with modern apartments, where active windshield wipers clear heavy rain and the wet asphalt reflects the overcast sky. As the bus proceeds, it follows a large delivery truck past parallel tram tracks before slowing down to approach a bus stop shelter with yellow signage. The scene then shifts to a stationary position at the stop, where the doors open to allow passengers, including a man in a hat, to board under the cover of the shelter. Finally, the bus pulls away from the curb and passes a white car before coming to a halt at a red traffic light over a wet zebra crossing.
